name: Pint of View Lecture Over Drinks: How to Map a Revolution—AI & the DNA of Political Collapse
description: Why do groups with aligned interests fail to coordinate? Dr. Raul V. Rodriguez, Vice President of Woxsen University, examines coordination failure across teams, institutions and nations, drawing on behavioural science and geopolitical case studies from Iran and India, in this lecture over drinks

name: A Mother’s Day Baking Experience
description: A Mother's Day baking session at Jus'Trufs for parents and children, or any two people who want a morning of making something sweet together. Chocolate truffle bento cake and vanilla cupcakes, all packed to take home
